title: Agent runners profiles manifest
description: Product-level profile templates the portal Create-Agent wizard offers. A profile is a named PRESET of components (components.json) on top of the single base runner, plus default roles. The wizard pre-checks the preset's components; the user may uncheck or add any component. The portal vendors this file; agent-runners is the single source of truth.

default.description: Default profile slug pre-selected in the wizard. MUST be one of profiles[].slug.

order.description: Dropdown order. MUST list every profiles[].slug exactly once.

runner.description: The single base runner variant all profiles install onto (ubuntu-claude-code). Profiles differ by components, not runner.

aliases.description: Legacy slug → canonical slug (e.g. 'qa-generalist' → 'swe-full-stack', 'swe-bare' → 'swe-native'). The portal canonicalises on resolve + display so persisted rows keep working after a rename.

name.description: Template name shown in the wizard dropdown + consolidated profile block.

description.description: One-line stack description (helper text + row sub-line).

runner.description: Base runner variant this profile installs onto (always ubuntu-claude-code).

default_roles.description: Roles seeded into agents.capabilities when the wizard omits an explicit roles[] override AND the component set includes sidebutton-server. Without the server the agent has capabilities=[] (not dispatchable).

components.description: Infra component slugs (components.json) pre-checked in the wizard for this profile. The user may uncheck or add any component before provisioning; the final set is threaded as AGENT_COMPONENTS. Plugins are NOT components — they are a separate role-driven catalog (plugins.json) selected in wizard Step 2 and sent as SIDEBUTTON_PLUGINS.
